title: Gear Aid Rubber Boot Saver with UV Protection Outdoor Shoe Care Repair - Clear

Gear Aid Rubber Boot Saver with UV Protection Outdoor Shoe Care Repair - Clear

Sun damage, blooming and excessive drying can wreak havoc on rubber boots. To keep rubber looking and performing its best, reach for Rubber Boot Saver by Gear Aid. Rubber Boot Saver is a rubber conditioner and UV protectant that not only moisturizes plastic and rubber boots, but also protects them from UV exposure, dirt and oils.

Key Features

  • Rubber conditioner and protectant
  • Protects rubber, plastic, neoprene and vinyl from sun damage
  • Restores appearance and shine
  • Prevents blooming and removes white marks
  • Helps keep dirt and oils off

Product Specifications

  • UPC: 021563226003

Ideal for use on muck boots, rubber boots, plastic, neoprene or vinyl, Rubber Boot Saver instantly restores shine while conditioning rubber and preventing UV degradation. Keep your rubber boots around for a while with Rubber Boot Saver by Gear Aid.
